response.justification: Strong candidate with 16+ years of full-stack experience and demonstrated expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes. Currently building AI-agent infrastructure in the exact role/company described. Primary concern is resume gaps—Nest.js, Vitest, and specific testing frameworks are not mentioned despite clear testing/TDD focus. Resume authenticity issue (name mismatch: Aisha Okonkwo vs. Bogdan Szabo) warrants clarification. Technical depth and engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, architecture) align well; missing details are likely learnable.
strengths: 16+ years full-stack experience; currently Staff Engineer at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure (directly matches required skill)
Strong recent coverage of primary stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes across Optilyz and current role
Demonstrated architecture and engineering practices: CI/CD setup, trunk-based development, TDD mindset, infrastructure automation
concerns: Resume omits Nest.js despite being primary stack requirement; unclear if unfamiliar or simply not mentioned
Testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly listed; missing specificity on testing approaches despite TDD emphasis
Resume authenticity issues: name mismatch (Aisha Okonkwo vs. Bogdan Szabo in contact) and overlapping employment periods need clarification

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent + Staff Engineer level at re:cinq
Nest.js and specific testing framework gaps
